info.title: Workspace Permissions
info.description: Control and manage your users detailed permissions upon Workspaces and Engines.

servers.description: URL for the AWS Europe region
URL for the AWS Asia Pacific region
URL for the AWS United States East region
URL for the AWS Australia region
URL for the Azure United States West region

get.summary: Read a service account workspace permission
get.description: Read a permission of a service account on a workspace.

put.summary: Update a service account workspace permission
put.description: Update a permission of a service account on a workspace.

requestBody.description:
Rights to update on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

schema.description:
Rights to update on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

403.description: Not authorized to update the permission

404.description: The permission to update doesn’t exist

post.summary: Create a service account workspace permission
post.description: Create a permission of a service account on a workspace.

requestBody.description:
Rights to add on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

schema.description:
Rights to add on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

403.description: Not authorized to update the permission

404.description: The workspace or the user does not exist

409.description: The permission already exists for workspace

delete.summary: Delete a service account workspace permission
delete.description: Delete a permission of a service account on a workspace.

404.description: The permission to delete doesn’t exist

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9

schema.description: The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9

parameters.name: serviceAccountId
parameters.description: The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

schema.description: The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

requestBody.description:
Rights to update on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

schema.description:
Rights to update on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

403.description: Not authorized to update the permission

404.description: The permission to update doesn’t exist

post.description: Create a permission of a user on a workspace.

requestBody.description:
Rights to add on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

Rights to add on the permission.
Example: ["AUTHOR","EXECUTE"]

404.description: The workspace or the user does not exist

409.description: The permission already exists for workspace

delete.description: Delete a permission of a user on a workspace.

404.description: The permission to delete doesn’t exist

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9

schema.description: The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

schema.description: The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

put.summary: Update sets of workspace permissions for a service account
put.description: Update sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be updated.Update actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

requestBody.description: The collection of permissions to update.

schema.description: The collection of permissions to update.

204.description: All changes on Permissions were successful

207.description: Execution result detailed status on elementary changes rejected.

404.description: The workspace id or the user does not exist

post.summary: Create sets of workspace permissions for a service account
post.description: Create sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be created.Creation actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

requestBody.description: The collection of permissions to create.

schema.description: The collection of permissions to create.

204.description: All changes on Permissions were successful

207.description: Execution result detailed status on elementary changes rejected.

404.description: The workspace id or the user does not exist

delete.summary: Delete workspace permissions for a service account
delete.description:
Remove all permissions where service account id is one from specified ones with request AND workspace is one from specified ones with request.
Special case: empty collection for users means that permissions for all service accounts and specified workspaces will be deleted (and vise versa).

parameters.name: workspaceIds
parameters.description: Workspace ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified users.

schema.description: Workspace ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified users.

parameters.name: serviceAccountIds
parameters.description: Service account ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified workspaces.

schema.description: Service account ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified workspaces.

204.description: All changes on Permissions were successful

207.description: Execution result detailed status on elementary changes rejected.

404.description: The workspace id or the user does not exist

get.summary: Retrieve all workspace permissions for a service account according to search criteria
get.description:
It retrieves all workspace permissions according to several criteria:

environment : One environment of the account
workspace : One workspace of one environment of the account
serviceAccount : One service account of the account

schema.description:
The workspace id (Optional)
Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9

The environment id (Optional)
Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a8

parameters.name: serviceAccountId
parameters.description:
The service account id (Optional)
Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

schema.description:
The service account id (Optional)
Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

404.description: The environment id or the workspace id or the user id does not exist

put.description: Update sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be updated.Update actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

requestBody.description: The collection of permissions to update.

schema.description: The collection of permissions to update.

204.description: All changes on Permissions were successful

207.description: Execution result detailed status on elementary changes rejected.

404.description: The workspace id or the user does not exist

post.description: Create sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be created.Creation actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

requestBody.description: The collection of permissions to create.

schema.description: The collection of permissions to create.

204.description: All changes on Permissions were successful

207.description: Execution result detailed status on elementary changes rejected.

404.description: The workspace id or the user does not exist

delete.description:
Remove all permissions where user id is one from specified ones with request AND workspace is one from specified ones with request.
Special case: empty collection for users means that permissions for all users and specified workspaces will be deleted (and vise versa).

parameters.name: userIds
parameters.description: User ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified workspaces.

schema.description: User ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified workspaces.

parameters.name: workspaceIds
parameters.description: Workspace ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified users.

schema.description: Workspace ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified users.

204.description: All changes on Permissions were successful

207.description: Execution result detailed status on elementary changes rejected.

404.description: The workspace id or the user does not exist

get.summary: Retrieve all workspace permissions according to search criteria
get.description:
It retrieves all workspace permissions according to several criteria:

* environment : One environment of the account
* workspace : One workspace of one environment of the account
* user : One user of the account

schema.description:
The workspace id (Optional)
Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9

The environment id (Optional)
Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a8

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description:
The user id (Optional)
Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

schema.description:
The user id (Optional)
Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191

404.description: The environment id or the workspace id or the user id does not exist

detail.example: Token authorization is required for access

requestId.description: The unique identification of the request involved with this error

Public.description: This Bearer authentication can be set in the Authorization header of your requests. Authentication tokens and Personal Access Tokens are supported. Personal Access Tokens can be generated in the Profile Preferences page of the Talend Cloud Portal.
Public.name: Authorization

Unitary management.description: Allows to manage workspace permissions of personal and non personal users on a fine-grained unitary way.

Provisioning and Mass management.description: Allows to take mass input management actions on workspace permissions globally.

Commons.description: Data types common to workspace permissions API
